name: birthday-reminder-app
description: /birthday-app   ├── /config          # Database and environment configurations   ├── /controllers     # Logic handling incoming requests   ├── /models          # Database schemas   ├── /routes          # API endpoints mapping to controllers   ├── /services        # Business logic (Emails, Cron jobs)   ├── /public          # Simple frontend UI (HTML/CSS/JS)   ├── /tests           # Unit and integration tests   ├── app.js           # Express app setup   ├── server.js        # Server entry point   ├── package.json   └── .env
